common.photoLimit: You can add up to {0} photos
photoTag.approveHint: Tags stay hidden until you approve them, and never reach your Tagged tab without you.
photoTag.audienceHint: Choose who can mention you in posts and comments, and who can tag you in photos.
photoTag.signInPrompt: Sign in to Aethernet to choose who can mention and tag you
photoTag.tagLimit: You can tag up to {0} people
photoTag.tapToTag: Tap the photo to tag someone
social.activityEmpty: Nothing here yet. Interactions with your posts will show up here
moderation.inReviewHint: Only you can see this until the review finishes
moderation.removedAdult: Your post was removed because it appears to contain adult content, which is not allowed here.
moderation.removedViolence: Your post was removed because it appears to contain violent or graphic content.
moderation.removedHarassment: Your post was removed because it appears to contain abusive or harassing language.
moderation.removedHate: Your post was removed because it appears to contain hateful content.
moderation.removedSelfHarm: Your post was removed because it appears to reference self-harm.
moderation.removedPolicy: Your post was removed for violating the community guidelines.
moderation.removedFooter: If you believe this is a mistake, let us know through the Feedback app.
dm.emptyHint: Message a friend from your friend list
dm.signInPrompt: Sign in to message your friends
dm.noMutualFriends: Share numbers in-game to start messaging.
message.notesHint: Add a private note about this contact
message.signInPrompt: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to use Message
message.noContacts: Add friends by number in the Contacts tab to call them
message.deleteConfirm: Delete this message for everyone in this chat?
collections.linkHint: Link your character to see what you own.
collections.collectionPrivate: This collection is private on the Lodestone.
collections.ownedUnavailable: Couldn't load your owned items right now.
venues.emptyHint: Try a different filter or search
phone.title: Phone
phone.signInPrompt: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to make calls
phone.enableBody: Voice calls with other Aetherphone users
phone.audioHint: Audio plays on your system default output device. Use headphones to avoid echo. A device change applies to your next call.
phone.noContacts: Add friends by number in the Friends app to call them
phone.notMutual: Waiting for them to add you back
phone.noRecentCallsHint: Calls you make and receive will appear here
friends.title: Friends
friends.shareHint: Share it in-game so friends can add you
friends.invalidNumber: That does not look like a phone number
friends.notFound: No one answers at that number
friends.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute
friends.addFailed: Could not add the number right now
friends.emptyHint: Ask for a number in-game and add it here
friends.pending: Waiting for them to add your number
friends.newNumberBody: If someone you do not trust has your number, you can ask for a new one. Everyone who saved your old number will lose it.
friends.reasonHint: Tell us briefly why you need a new number
friends.requestFailed: Could not send the request right now
friends.requestPending: Your request is waiting for review
friends.requestApproved: Your number was changed. Share the new one with people you trust
friends.signInPrompt: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to use Friends
settings.title: Settings
settings.generalFooter: Personalize how your phone looks, reads and behaves.
settings.alertsFooter: Choose how calls and notifications reach you.
settings.vibrationHint: The phone shakes briefly when a notification arrives.
settings.scrollWhileIdleHint: Your character scrolls through their phone (Tomescroll emote) while standing still and out of combat. Does nothing if you haven't unlocked the emote.
settings.startupHint: Open the phone automatically when you log in. Open minimized shows it as a small dock that you tap to expand.
settings.soundImportHint: Imported files appear in the list below and play at the volume set here, separate from the game's own sound settings.
settings.tutorialsHint: Tips appear once the first time you open each app. Reset to see them all again.
settings.privacyHint: Aetherphone is made by one solo developer. Sharing anonymous usage, which apps you open and for how long plus your region, helps me see what to build next. It never includes your character name, your messages, or any personal data.
settings.chatPrivacyHint: These apply to the Message app. If you turn read receipts or last seen off, you will not send them and you will not see them from others either.
settings.consentMessage:
Aetherphone is made by one solo developer. To keep making it better for everyone, it really helps to know which apps people use and where to focus next.

With your OK, the app shares anonymous usage only: which apps you open and for how long, plus your region. It never includes your character name, your messages, or any personal data.

You can change this anytime in Settings, under Privacy. Thank you for helping shape Aetherphone.
settings.commandsHint: Type these into the chat box. Reset brings the phone back to the middle of your screen if you ever move it out of view.
settings.commandMarket: Open the market board, optionally searching an item
settings.commandReset: Move the phone back to the center of the screen
changelog.r0970.0: Velvet now has stories: share a photo your connections can watch for 24 hours before it disappears on its own
changelog.r0970.1: You can now tap the seen count on your own story to see everyone who watched it, and when
changelog.r0970.2: Tapping a profile photo in Chirper, Aethergram, Velvet, or Message now opens it enlarged
changelog.r0970.3: The story tray now scrolls away with the feed instead of staying pinned above the posts
changelog.r0970.4: Aethergram's bottom tabs now light up and name themselves as you point at them
changelog.r0970.5: Notification rows now highlight as you point at them in Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet
changelog.r0970.6: Photo captions on Aethergram, Velvet, and stories now go through moderation alongside the photo itself
changelog.r0970.7: A story photo that is still in review is now held back in the story viewer, the way it already was everywhere else
changelog.r0970.8: Aetherphone is now about a third smaller to download and install: the wallpapers it ships with are packed far more efficiently at the same resolution
changelog.r0970.9: Encrypted chats now set up on computers that run the game through Wine or Proton, where creating the security key used to fail
changelog.r0970.10: A PC that cannot support encrypted chats now says so in the chat encryption sheet, instead of showing Setting up encryption forever
changelog.r0970.11: Fixed composing a story framing your photo as a square when it publishes tall
changelog.r0970.12: Fixed sharing a story showing no progress, leaving the Share button looking untouched for the whole upload
changelog.r0970.13: Fixed being offered a new story tile beside the ring of the story you had already posted
changelog.r0970.14: Fixed a story's caption and its seen count landing on top of each other
changelog.r0970.15: Fixed leaving an app in the middle of a story leaving that story hanging over the app when you came back
changelog.r0970.16: Fixed the story delete confirmation saying it couldn't delete the post
changelog.r0970.17: A story that has expired is now treated as gone everywhere, including its viewer list
changelog.r0970.18: Fixed Aetherphone closing the game on startup for players whose Windows country or regional format is set to Russia or Belarus
changelog.r0970.19: Fixed some labels, such as the Ringtone row in Settings and the Control Center tiles, staying in the previous language after you changed language
changelog.r0970.20: Fixed the details under a Velvet profile's name landing on top of each other when the person is looking for several things at once
changelog.r0970.21: Turkish uppercase labels are now spelled correctly throughout the phone: headings like UYARILAR no longer come out with a lowercase ı in the middle
changelog.r0970.22: You can now mention people with @ in a chirp, a caption, or a comment across Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet: the handle becomes a link that opens their profile
changelog.r0970.23: Typing @ while composing now suggests people to pick from, so you no longer have to remember a handle exactly
changelog.r0970.24: Being mentioned now reaches you as a notification that opens the post it came from
changelog.r0970.25: You can now tag people in your Aethergram photos: turn on Tag people while composing, tap the photo, and choose who it is
changelog.r0970.26: A photo carrying tags now shows a small person chip: tap it to reveal the names, and tap a name to open that profile
changelog.r0970.27: Aethergram profiles now have a Tagged tab, holding the photos you have been tagged in
changelog.r0970.28: Settings now has a Tags and mentions screen, where you choose who can mention you in posts and comments, and who can tag you in photos
changelog.r0970.29: You can now hold tags for review before they appear: turn on Manually approve tags, and nothing reaches your Tagged tab until you approve it
changelog.r0970.30: Fixed the reason a call was declined or unavailable, the Wallet section headers, and the Calculator error staying in English whatever language your phone was set to
changelog.r0970.31: Fixed the edited marker on a message reading backwards in Turkish, Japanese, and German, where the time has to come first
changelog.r0970.32: Fixed a post's detail view still showing In review after the review had finished, and hiding the comments other people had left
changelog.r0970.33: Fixed speckles appearing along the edges of small rounded corners
changelog.r0970.34: The phone now tells you when a newer Aetherphone is out: an update button appears beneath it, and clicking it takes you straight to Dalamud's plugin installer
changelog.r0970.35: Fixed the phone forgetting where you last left it minimized, so minimizing it again returns it to that spot instead of the full phone's corner
changelog.r0970.36: Fixed the phone forgetting where you had placed it, full size and minimized, whenever the plugin was turned off and on again or the game restarted
changelog.r0970.37: Velvet photos are now for your connections only: the feed no longer shows posts from people you have not connected with
changelog.r0970.38: Choosing who can see a Velvet post is gone, because every post now goes to your connections and no further
changelog.r0970.39: Fixed importing a photo from your PC doing nothing visible when composing an Aethergram or Velvet post: it now lands in the photo grid, selected and numbered
changelog.r0970.40: Fixed Aethergram saying nothing when you tried to add a ninth photo to a post, instead of telling you eight is the limit
changelog.r0960.0: Velvet has been rebuilt from the ground up, with an after-dark look and every screen redrawn around Discover
changelog.r0960.1: Velvet's Discover filters now live behind a filter button, leaving the whole screen to the people you are browsing
changelog.r0960.2: Velvet's role and tag pickers are now sorted into categories that match how roleplay communities actually describe themselves
changelog.r0960.3: Setting up Velvet is now a guided flow that walks you through your identity, what you are looking for, and your profile
changelog.r0960.4: Velvet now has a guided tour that shows you around the first time you open it
changelog.r0960.5: Velvet now speaks every language Aetherphone supports, instead of always showing English
changelog.r0960.6: You can now send an intro message with a Velvet connection request, and choose who is allowed to message you
changelog.r0960.7: Japanese, Chinese, Russian, and Korean text now renders everywhere in the phone instead of turning into question marks, whatever language your phone is set to
changelog.r0960.8: New messages and notifications now reach you the moment they are sent, instead of waiting for the next refresh
changelog.r0960.9: You can now stay signed in on several computers at once: a second install no longer knocks the first offline, and calls ring properly again
changelog.r0960.10: Picking up a call on one device now stops the ringing on the others
changelog.r0960.11: The phone now goes quiet while it is closed or minimized, cutting its background network use to a fraction
changelog.r0960.12: Photos and other media now load faster and are reused from cache instead of being downloaded again every time
changelog.r0960.13: KupoAI now answers everyday questions far more reliably instead of coming up empty when your wording does not match the wiki
changelog.r0960.14: KupoAI now reads wiki tables and infoboxes, so unlock requirements, item costs, and step tables make it into its answers
changelog.r0960.15: KupoAI now recognizes the colloquial names people actually use for pages, not just their official titles
changelog.r0960.16: KupoAI replies no longer carry stray bracketed citation numbers
changelog.r0960.17: The phone now opens by itself when you log in; you can turn this off in Settings
changelog.r0960.18: Dragging the minimized phone no longer drags the full phone with it: each one remembers its own place on screen
changelog.r0960.19: Fixed comments overlapping each other in a Chirper post thread when they had likes
changelog.r0960.20: The Aetherphone website is now available in all eight languages and follows your browser's language automatically
changelog.r0960.21: Plugin developers can now propose their plugin as a phone app through the new App integration request form on GitHub
changelog.r0960.22: Aethergram and Velvet posts can now hold up to 8 photos instead of just one
changelog.r0960.23: Posts with several photos now show dot indicators and arrows, so you can swipe through them straight from the feed
changelog.r0960.24: Composing a multi-photo post now walks you through framing each photo in turn before you write the caption
changelog.r0960.25: Aethergram now has stories: share a photo that everyone can watch for 24 hours before it disappears on its own
changelog.r0960.26: The Aethergram feed now opens with a story tray, where a bright ring marks anyone whose story you have not watched yet
changelog.r0960.27: Fixed photo grids and chat image bubbles shaking every frame in the gallery, the post composers, the wallpaper picker, and message threads
changelog.r0960.28: Fixed the compose button also clicking the post sitting behind it in Chirper, Velvet, and Message
changelog.r0960.29: Fixed Chirper reacting to the post underneath when you clicked an open menu on top of it
changelog.r0950.0: Aetherphone now has its own website at www.aetherphone.net, where you can explore the phone and all of its apps
changelog.r0950.1: Velvet chats now let you react to messages with an emoji, and clicking a reaction count shows who reacted
changelog.r0950.2: You can now reply to a Velvet message, with the original quoted inside your bubble
changelog.r0950.3: You can now edit or delete a Velvet message you already sent
changelog.r0950.4: You can now record and send voice notes in Velvet
changelog.r0950.5: You can now search for radio stations by name in Music
changelog.r0950.6: Radio browsing in Music now loads more stations as you keep scrolling and offers more genres to explore
changelog.r0950.7: Chirper and Aethergram now load more posts automatically as you scroll to the bottom
changelog.r0950.8: Message and Velvet now load older messages when you scroll to the top of a conversation
changelog.r0950.9: Encrypted chats look cleaner now that the redundant lock icon no longer appears on every message bubble
changelog.r0940.0: You can now like comments in Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet, and you get notified when someone likes yours
changelog.r0940.1: Aetherphone now connects through api.aetherphone.net, its own permanent address; the switch happens automatically and needs nothing from you
changelog.r0940.2: Server traffic now runs behind additional protection against outages and abuse, for a more reliable connection
changelog.r0931.0: Fixed encrypted chats being stuck on Setting up encryption: the key exchange now completes, and Message and Velvet conversations lock end-to-end as intended
changelog.r0931.1: Encryption setup now retries on its own after a connection hiccup instead of staying stuck until you relog
changelog.r0931.2: An open chat now notices when your contact becomes ready for encryption and locks the conversation without you having to reopen it
changelog.r0930.0: You can now reply to any message in Message: the quoted original shows inside your bubble, and clicking it jumps back to that message
changelog.r0930.1: React to messages with a quick emoji strip; reaction counts appear under the bubble, and clicking a count shows who reacted
changelog.r0930.2: You can now edit a text you already sent, and edited messages show a small marker next to the time
changelog.r0930.3: Delete a message for everyone in the chat; it is replaced by a quiet placeholder
changelog.r0930.4: Forward a message to another chat: it arrives with a Forwarded label and you land in that conversation right away
changelog.r0930.5: Record voice notes with the mic button and send them as playable bubbles with progress and duration
changelog.r0930.6: Search inside a conversation from the chat header and jump between matches
changelog.r0930.7: Star messages you want to keep and find them all in the new Starred screen
changelog.r0930.8: Mute a busy chat from the list: its banners stop and it no longer counts toward the app badge
changelog.r0930.9: Chats now show when the other person is online or when they were last seen
changelog.r0930.10: Text you typed but never sent is kept as a draft and previewed in the chat list
changelog.r0930.11: Message info on your own messages shows when they were sent and read, member by member in groups
changelog.r0930.12: The encryption banner is now a lock in the chat header: click it to see a security code you can compare with your contact
changelog.r0930.13: New privacy toggles in Settings let you turn off read receipts and hide when you were last online
changelog.r0930.14: Rebuilt Music as a Spotify-style experience with a dark look, a personalized home screen, a dedicated search screen, and radio categories
changelog.r0930.15: Playing a song no longer switches screens: a mini player slides in at the bottom instead
changelog.r0930.16: Now Playing opens as a full-screen sheet with album art, drag-to-seek, and a volume slider
changelog.r0930.17: You can now pause and resume playback, including radio stations, from Music, the mini player, or the Dynamic Island
changelog.r0930.18: Folders on the Home screen now show a badge with the total unread count of the apps inside
changelog.r0930.19: Added page-flip buttons at the left and right edges of the Home screen as an alternative to swiping
changelog.r0930.20: Fresh installs now start with a curated two-page Home layout and a stocked dock
changelog.r0930.21: Repacked Control Center into a tidy grid with no empty cells; existing layouts move over automatically
changelog.r0930.22: The media control in Control Center is now a large square tile with artwork, title, and playback buttons
changelog.r0930.23: Darkened the backdrop behind Control Center so Home icons no longer show through the tiles
changelog.r0930.24: Tapping the Dynamic Island now opens the app it is showing, even while the island is expanded
changelog.r0930.25: A burst of messages from one conversation now updates a single banner instead of playing one banner per message
changelog.r0930.26: Fixed new-message alerts never appearing while the phone was closed or minimized with Message left open
changelog.r0930.27: Fixed long tooltips spilling past the window edge; they now wrap and stay inside
changelog.r0920.0: Added KupoAI, a new app that answers your questions about Final Fantasy XIV straight from the wiki, complete with sources to read more
changelog.r0920.1: Combined Friends, Phone, and your direct messages into a single app called ChocoChat, so your chats, contacts, and calls all live in one place
changelog.r0920.2: The Calls tab now keeps a full call history like a real phone, and badges any calls you missed
changelog.r0920.3: A brief connection drop no longer ends your call: it quietly reconnects on its own within a short grace period
changelog.r0920.4: You can now reopen an ongoing call from the Dynamic Island at the top of the screen
changelog.r0920.5: You can browse your chats and contacts during a call, and switch to another call without hanging up first
changelog.r0920.6: Merged the Chat, Contacts, and Find People apps into one in-game messaging app and renamed it Linkpearl, with a new pearl icon
changelog.r0920.7: Added a guided setup after the welcome screen that walks you through signing in, setting up your profile and photo, and choosing your analytics preference
changelog.r0920.8: Reporting now happens through one consistent popup everywhere, where you pick a category and add details, instead of a different form in each app
changelog.r0920.9: The welcome tour now points right at the real buttons and widgets on screen as it guides you around the phone
changelog.r0920.10: Links in your messages are now underlined and open in your browser when you click them
changelog.r0920.11: New automatic moderation reviews everything posted to the social apps and flags or removes anything inappropriate to keep the feeds safe
changelog.r0910.0: Your one-to-one and group chats in Messages, and your Velvet messages, are now end-to-end encrypted, so only you and the people you're talking to can read them. Not even the server can
changelog.r0910.1: Encryption is automatic: your key is created quietly the first time you sign in, with nothing to set up and no passphrase to remember
changelog.r0910.2: On a new computer a fresh key is created automatically, and older messages become readable again once your chat partners come online
changelog.r0910.3: Added an Encrypted Chats page in Settings to check your encryption status or reset your key
changelog.r0910.4: Encrypted messages show a small lock, and a banner lets you know when a conversation is end-to-end encrypted
changelog.r0910.5: You can now report a message: right-click it and choose Report. The message and a few before it are shared with the moderators, decrypted, so they can review it
changelog.r0910.6: Right-clicking a message now opens a quick menu to report it or copy its text
changelog.r0900.0: Added Friends, a new app to add people by their phone number and share your own number in-game
changelog.r0900.1: Added Messages, a new app for private one-to-one and group chats with your friends
changelog.r0900.2: Calling is now limited to friends who have added each other, so only people you both trust can reach you
changelog.r0900.3: You can now request a new phone number in Friends if someone you would rather not hear from has your old one
changelog.r0900.4: Rebuilt the Home screen around a flexible grid of app icons, folders, and resizable widgets
changelog.r0900.5: Added a dock at the bottom of the Home screen for up to four favorite apps
changelog.r0900.6: Added Home screen widgets, including a Skywatcher forecast, Clock, Calendar, a Photos shuffle, and Resets
changelog.r0900.7: Added a gallery to browse widgets and preview their sizes before placing them
changelog.r0900.8: Added a Home edit mode to rearrange icons, resize widgets, disband folders, and drag items to new pages
changelog.r0900.9: Apps now open and close by growing from and shrinking back to their icon
changelog.r0900.10: Swipe up from the home bar to return to the Home screen from any app
changelog.r0900.11: Added a Home grid density option for five, six, or seven rows, plus a layout reset, in Settings
changelog.r0900.12: Skywatcher now shows live animated weather in the app and on its widget
changelog.r0900.13: Redesigned the Venues cards and added a detail page for each venue
changelog.r0900.14: Added an Activity tab to Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet that gathers your likes, comments, and follows
changelog.r0900.15: Added a quick menu to posts for actions like reporting and deleting
changelog.r0900.16: Velvet now lets you pin conversations to the top of your chats
changelog.r0900.17: Renamed the old Messages app to Chat, since it covers your linkshell and in-game chat
changelog.r0900.18: Added a mute bell to each linkshell in Chat so you can silence a busy channel straight from the list
changelog.r0900.19: Combined calls and now-playing music into one Dynamic Island that splits in two, just like on a real phone
changelog.r0900.20: Notification banners now spring in, pause while you hover them, and can be flicked upward to dismiss
changelog.r0900.21: Control Center is now customizable: rearrange, resize, add, and remove its controls like the Home screen
changelog.r0900.22: The minimized phone now morphs smoothly to and from full size, with expand and close buttons and an unread badge
changelog.r0900.23: Added photo zoom with panning and double-tap across Photos, Aethergram, Velvet, and Chat
changelog.r0900.24: Redesigned the phone's side buttons and frame with a machined graphite metal finish
changelog.r0900.25: Reworked Settings with real icons, an account banner up top, and animated toggles
changelog.r0900.26: Redesigned the welcome tour with an animated illustration, and tours now glide smoothly between steps
changelog.r0900.27: Action buttons across the app now show matching animated tooltips when you hover them
changelog.r0900.28: Smoothed out app open, close, and minimize animations so they feel physical and can be interrupted
changelog.r0900.29: Tidied up the codebase and shared design system for better performance and a more consistent look
changelog.r0900.30: Fixed the phone's corners so every screen and app uses one consistent rounded shape
changelog.r0900.31: Fixed tooltips that could appear behind Control Center tiles
changelog.r0900.32: Fixed 2048 so swiping slides the tiles instead of leaving duplicates behind
changelog.r0870.0: Added Polls, a new app for voting in single-choice polls
changelog.r0870.1: Notifications now take you straight to the post or profile they're about in Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet
changelog.r0870.2: Added tappable follower and following lists on profiles, and a liked-by list on posts
changelog.r0870.10: Refined the comment section in Aethergram
changelog.r0870.3: Velvet now lets you cancel connection requests you've sent, review them in a compact Sent section, and disconnect from people you're connected with
changelog.r0870.11: Made the contact's profile picture bigger in Velvet chats
changelog.r0870.12: Refined the edit profile screen in Velvet
changelog.r0870.13: Social apps now show your username and region only, instead of your character name and home world
changelog.r0870.4: You can now choose the region shown on your social profiles in Settings, instead of it always being detected for you
changelog.r0870.5: Settings now shows a badge when there's a new changelog entry you haven't read yet
changelog.r0870.6: Changed the default wallpaper to Dusk
changelog.r0870.7: Fixed the Camera screen corners so they're rounded to match the rest of the phone
changelog.r0870.8: Fixed the phone-scrolling emote continuing to play while the phone is minimized
changelog.r0870.9: Fixed a crash in the Music app on Linux
changelog.r0860.0: Added Sign in with XIVAuth so you can link your account by approving in your browser instead of pasting a Lodestone code
changelog.r0860.1: Overhauled Games and every mini-game with arcade-style polish, screen shake, and juicier feedback
changelog.r0860.2: Redesigned Control Center to open with a tap and show your notifications right inside it
changelog.r0860.3: Home screen app icons and labels now stay legible over any wallpaper
changelog.r0860.4: Long posts and messages now wrap neatly as you type in every text box
changelog.r0860.5: You can now attach up to five photos to your feedback
changelog.r0860.6: Chirper now shows every reaction on a post instead of only the first three
changelog.r0860.7: Your own linkshell and cross-world linkshell messages now line up on the right, like direct messages
changelog.r0860.8: The unread badge on app icons now stays readable on any tile color
changelog.r0851.0: Fixed an issue where the preview of a long ringtone or notification sound kept playing after leaving Settings
changelog.r0850.0: Your local time now shows on your profile in Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet
changelog.r0850.1: Moved the time zone setting to a new Profile section in Settings
changelog.r0850.2: Added Calendar with a month view of community events and your own reminders
changelog.r0850.3: Added Feedback so you can send thoughts and bug reports straight to the developers
changelog.r0850.4: Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet now alert you to new likes, comments, and follows while the phone is closed
changelog.r0850.5: Added per-app notification controls to mute or set a custom sound for each app
changelog.r0850.6: Added a Commands page in Settings that lists every slash command
changelog.r0850.7: Added an option to open the phone automatically when you log in, full size or minimized
changelog.r0850.8: Added /phone reset to bring the phone back to the center of your screen
changelog.r0850.9: Refreshed every app icon with crisp new artwork
changelog.r0850.10: Rebuilt the apps on a shared design system for a more consistent look and feel
changelog.r0850.11: Polished animations and transitions throughout the interface
changelog.r0850.12: Tidied up the codebase for better performance and stability
changelog.r0850.13: Improved the home screen with app icons that magnify under your cursor and press in when tapped
changelog.r0850.14: Rebuilt Clock with World Clock, Alarms, Stopwatch, and Timer tabs
changelog.r0850.15: Added world clocks for cities around the globe alongside Eorzea and server time
changelog.r0850.16: Added Notes to jot things down and keep reminders with optional due dates
changelog.r0850.17: Added Calculator for quick everyday sums
changelog.r0850.18: Alarms, timers, and reminders now notify you even when the phone is closed
changelog.r0850.19: Added Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, and Russian translations
changelog.r0850.21: Gave incoming calls and notifications their own separate sounds, chosen in Settings
changelog.r0850.22: Added Import from PC to use your own MP3 or WAV files as ringtones and notification sounds
changelog.r0850.23: Added a volume control for ringtones and notification sounds
changelog.r0850.24: The phone now remembers its position, keeping separate spots for the full phone and the minimized view
changelog.r0850.25: Velvet now alerts you to new connection requests and when yours are accepted
changelog.r0850.26: The server info bar entry now shows Aetherphone with your unread notification count and always stays in English
changelog.r0850.27: Switching to a language with a different alphabet now shows the loading screen until all its characters are ready
changelog.r0850.28: Fixed an issue where linkshell messages could sometimes appear as direct messages
changelog.r0840.0: Refined accent colors across the social apps for a more cohesive look
changelog.r0840.1: Replaced inline delete buttons with a centered confirmation dialog
changelog.r0840.2: Added the ability to delete your own comments on posts
changelog.r0840.3: Added tooltip labels to action icons so you know what each one does
changelog.r0840.4: Redesigned the News app with dynamic image sizing, pixel-perfect titles, and maintenance status pills
changelog.r0840.5: Added spacing around chat bubbles in Messages and restored keyboard focus after sending
changelog.r0830.0: The minimized phone can now be moved freely, even when the position is locked
changelog.r0830.1: Replaced the side button lock with tap to minimize and hold to turn off
changelog.r0830.2: Control Center now stays in front of other windows
changelog.r0830.3: The minimized phone shakes and shows an unread badge when a notification arrives
changelog.r0830.4: Filled in missing German, French, and Turkish translations across Messages, Notifications, Chirper, Velvet, and Photos
changelog.r0820.0: Added linkshell chat channels to Messages alongside direct messages
changelog.r0820.1: Overhauled the notification center with stacking, swipe to dismiss, and deep links into the right app
changelog.r0820.2: Added a minimized phone window you can restore by tapping it or on an incoming call
changelog.r0820.3: Chirper, Aethergram, and Velvet now each support their own profile picture
changelog.r0820.4: Added follow/unfollow, comment threads, and avatar cropping to Chirper
changelog.r0820.5: Redesigned the Velvet profile and added time zone sharing and secure image DMs
changelog.r0820.6: Added a confirmation step before deleting a photo
changelog.r0820.7: Smoothed out status bar and window transition animations
changelog.r0810.0: Added a subtle shadow behind home screen app labels for readability on bright wallpapers
changelog.r0800.0: Added Velvet, a private 18+ companion app for sharing work and connecting
changelog.r0800.1: Added an adjustable phone window size in Settings
changelog.r0800.2: Added post deletion, captions, and comments across the social apps
changelog.r0710.0: Added a guided onboarding tour with coachmarks
changelog.r0710.1: Added content reporting to Chirper and Aethergram
changelog.r0710.2: Brought call and notification banners in front of other windows
changelog.r0710.3: Localized Phone Calls and filled in missing translations
changelog.r0700.0: Added Phone with group voice calls
changelog.r0700.2: Added Aethergram, an Instagram-style photo app
changelog.r0700.3: Added Find People, Maps, Collections, and Inventory apps
changelog.r0700.5: Added Dailies to track recurring content
changelog.r0700.6: Rebuilt Activity into a fitness-style dashboard with job mastery rings
changelog.r0700.7: Reworked the Lodestone sign-in flow with an identity card and step guide
changelog.r0700.8: Added Tetris to Games, contributed by Yesanith
changelog.r0700.9: Connected the Aethernet apps to the production backend
changelog.r0600.0: Added Timers for server resets, retainers, and reminders
changelog.r0600.1: Added Venues to browse community events in-game
changelog.r0600.2: Added News with a region-aware Lodestone feed
changelog.r0600.3: Added Light, Dark, and Auto themes for app content
changelog.r0600.4: Added the Side button: tap to close, hold to lock
changelog.r0600.5: Rebuilt Games with new titles and an arcade-style launcher
changelog.r0600.6: Overhauled Clock, Market, Contacts, Wallet, Messages, and Notifications
changelog.r0500.0: Added image wallpapers with Light and Dark variants and custom imports
changelog.r0500.1: Added home screen editing, a lock screen, and Control Center
changelog.r0500.2: Added an idle phone-scrolling emote you can toggle in Settings
changelog.r0500.3: Added full localization in English, French, German, and Turkish
changelog.r0500.4: Refined typography, depth, and spring animations across the phone
changelog.r0400.0: Added Camera with a see-through viewfinder
changelog.r0200.0: Added Market with live Universalis prices
changelog.r0200.1: Added Music, an internet radio player
changelog.r0200.2: Added Wallet to track your gil
changelog.r0200.3: Added Chirper and Aethernet account sign-in
changelog.r0200.4: Added a Text Size accessibility setting
changelog.r0200.5: Moved notifications into an in-shell banner
changelog.r0200.6: Added weather glyphs and a live sky to Skywatcher
changelog.r0130.1: Laid the networking foundation for online features
changelog.r0120.0: Added an iPhone-style welcome and boot animation
changelog.r0110.1: Added a status bar with battery, signal, and network
changelog.r0110.2: Added a lock button to the phone
changelog.r0100.0: Introduced Aetherphone, an in-game smartphone in a single window
changelog.r0100.1: Added the home screen, status bar, and swipe-driven app shell
changelog.r0100.2: Shipped the first apps: Messages, Contacts, Character, Clock, Skywatcher, and Notifications
wallpaper.title: Wallpaper
wallpaper.gestureHint: Drag to move · scroll to zoom
profile.title: Profile
profile.regionHelp: Your region shows on your social profiles in place of your character name and home world.
profile.timeZoneHelp: Show your local time on your profile so others can find a moment that works for both of you.
profile.signInToShare: Sign in to your Aethernet account to share your time zone.
account.title: Aethernet Account
account.heroSignInSubtitle: Set up your Aethernet account, profile and region
account.logInFirst: Log in to your character first
account.signInIntro: One account signs you in to every Aethernet app: Chirper, Aethergram and more. Ownership is verified through your Lodestone profile, so there's no password.
account.verifyIntro: Add this code to your Lodestone profile. You can remove it afterwards.
account.step3: Paste it into your profile, then click Confirm
account.cannotReach: Could not reach Aethernet. Is the server running?
account.codeNotFound: Code not found on your profile yet. Save it on Lodestone, then Verify again. Make sure both Profile and Character Search visibility are set to Public/Displayed in Results.
account.signOutConfirmBody: You can sign back in anytime. Your account and data stay safe.
account.gestureHint: Drag to move · scroll to zoom
account.lodestoneHint: No XIVAuth account? Verify with a Lodestone code instead.
account.xivIntro: We opened XIVAuth in your browser. Approve this device to finish signing in. If you're asked for a code, enter the one below.
account.fail.characterNotFound.title: Character not found
account.fail.characterNotFound.body: We couldn't find {0} on {1} in the Lodestone search. In your Character settings, set Character Search to Public, then Verify again.
account.fail.codeNotFound.title: Code not saved yet
account.fail.codeNotFound.body: We found your character, but the code isn't in your profile yet. Lodestone can take a minute to update after you save. Wait a moment, then Verify again. If it keeps happening, press Cancel below and try again with a new code.
account.fail.lodestoneUnavailable.title: Lodestone unavailable
account.fail.lodestoneUnavailable.body: The Lodestone didn't respond. This is on Square Enix's side, not yours. Wait a bit, then try again.
account.fail.timeout.title: Verification timed out
account.fail.timeout.body: The Lodestone took too long to respond. Your code is fine, just Verify again in a moment.
account.fail.challengeExpired.title: Code expired
account.fail.challengeExpired.body: This sign-in code expired. Start again to get a fresh one.
account.fail.banned.title: Character blocked
account.fail.banned.body: This character can't sign in to Aethernet. Reach out to support if you think this is a mistake.
account.fail.rateLimited.title: Too many attempts
account.fail.rateLimited.body: You've tried a few times in a row. Wait a minute, then try again.
account.fail.network.title: Can't reach Aethernet
account.fail.network.body: We couldn't reach the Aethernet server. Check your connection, then try again.
account.fail.accessDenied.title: Sign-in cancelled
account.fail.accessDenied.body: The request was declined on XIVAuth. Start again whenever you're ready.
account.fail.xivUnavailable.title: XIVAuth unavailable
account.fail.xivUnavailable.body: We couldn't reach XIVAuth. Wait a moment and try again, or verify with a Lodestone code instead.
account.fail.xivCharacter.title: Character not verified
account.fail.xivCharacter.body: {0} on {1} isn't a verified character on your XIVAuth account. Add and verify it on xivauth.net, then try again.
encryption.title: Encrypted Chats
encryption.intro: End-to-end encryption keeps your chats between you and the people you write to. Not even the Aethernet server can read them.
encryption.notSignedIn: Sign in to your Aethernet account first.
encryption.unsupportedBody: This computer cannot create the security key that encrypted chats need, so Messages and Velvet chats stay unavailable here. This usually happens when the game runs through Wine or Proton. The rest of Aetherphone works normally.
encryption.unsupportedSummary: This PC cannot set up encryption, so messages here are not encrypted.
encryption.activeHint: Encryption is active on this device. It works automatically. There is nothing to set up.
encryption.newDeviceHint: On a new computer a fresh key is created automatically. Older messages become readable again once your chat partners come online.
encryption.forgotBody: A new key will be created. Messages encrypted with the old key become readable again once your chat partners come online.
encryption.reportDisclosure: This message and up to 5 previous messages will be shared with the moderators, decrypted.
encryption.waitingMembers: {0} can't receive encrypted messages yet. Messages stay unencrypted until everyone has an encryption key.
encryption.securityCodeHint: Compare this code with {0}. If both phones show the same code, this chat is end-to-end encrypted.
encryption.securityCodeUnavailable: The security code appears once both of you have encryption keys.
music.noResultsSub: Check the spelling or try different keywords
music.radioSearchSub: Search by name, genre, or country
messages.deleteHistoryConfirm: Delete this conversation history? This can't be undone.

character.collectHint: Open a chat with someone or view a portrait once to link Lodestone for full collection stats

chirper.noComments: No replies yet. Start the conversation

story.noViewers: No one has seen this yet

velvet.gateBody: Velvet is a private, 18+ space for sharing mature work and connecting with like-minded people. By entering you confirm you are 18 or older and consent to see mature content.
velvet.gateDiscretion: This app can show on-screen in-game, so open it when the moment is right for you.
velvet.myPostsEmpty: You haven't posted yet. Tap + to share something
velvet.discoverEmpty: No one to show yet. Widen your filters
velvet.setupPrompt: Set up your profile so others can find you and connect.
velvet.feedEmpty: Nothing here yet. Tap + to share the first
velvet.connectionsEmpty: Connect with people to message them
velvet.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete this post? This can't be undone.
velvet.deleteCommentConfirmMessage: Delete this comment? This can't be undone.
velvet.onboardIntentHint: Pick what you're mainly looking for. You can change it any time.
velvet.onboardVibeHint: A short intro and a few tags help the right people find you.
velvet.onboardPrivacyHint: You choose whether others can find you, and you can lock the app with a PIN.
velvet.appLockHelp: Require a PIN to open Velvet, so nobody who grabs your screen can peek.
velvet.appearHelp: Let others find your profile in the Hub.
velvet.timeZoneHelp: Show others your current local time so it is easy to find a moment that works for both of you.
velvet.introHint: A little about you and what you're into…
velvet.gestureHint: Drag to move, scroll to zoom
velvet.noPhotos: No photos in your gallery yet
velvet.vibeCardHelp: Pick the roles and moods that fit you.
velvet.tagsCardHelp: Add themes so the right people can find you.
velvet.limitsCardHelp: Anything off the table, no exceptions.
velvet.lookingForHelp: What you're mainly here for right now.
velvet.relationshipHelp: Shown on your profile so people know where you stand.
velvet.noPhotosMine: You have not shared any photos yet.
velvet.connectToSeePhotos: Connect with {0} to see their photos
velvet.introSheetHint: Your intro lands in their Requests. A reply accepts you.
velvet.discoverNoneHint: Try clearing filters or check back later.
velvet.gateTagline: A private, adults only corner of the suite. Moonlit, unhurried, yours.
velvet.gateConsent: By entering you confirm you are 18 or older. Be kind, be discreet.
velvet.discoverableHelp: When on, your profile can be found by others in Discover.
velvet.whoHelp: Choose who can send you a one line intro. Friends means friends of friends.
velvet.profileUnavailableHint: This person may be private or no longer here.
velvet.signedOutHint: Sign in to your account to step inside.
velvet.obSubIdentity: This is the first thing people see in Discover.
velvet.obSubIntent: Choose everything that fits. It shapes who finds you.
velvet.obSubAbout: A line or two goes a long way.
velvet.obSubReady: A couple of last touches, then step inside.
velvet.obHandleHelp: Your handle is how people @mention you. You can change all of this later from Edit profile.
velvet.roleErpHelp: Optional. Shown because you are here for ERP.
velvet.vibeOptionalHelp: Optional. A few tags help the right people find you.
velvet.obDiscoverableHelp: When on, your profile can be found by others. When off, only people you connect with can see you.
velvet.obConductHelp: Velvet is for adults. Be kind and discreet, and remember block and report are always one tap away.

plugin.commandHelp: Toggle the Aetherphone. /phone market [item] opens the market board, /phone about opens credits & links, /phone reset recenters the phone, /phone test sends a sample notification.
plugin.sideButtonHint: Tap to minimize · Hold to turn off
plugin.updateChipHint: A newer Aetherphone is ready. Click to open Dalamud's plugin installer.
feedback.subtitle: Share your thoughts, suggestions, or bug reports directly with the developer
feedback.placeholder: What's on your mind? Suggestions, bug reports, feature ideas…
feedback.sentMessage: Your message has been sent to the developer.
feedback.confirmMessage: Send this feedback to the developer?
feedback.errorMessage: Couldn't send your feedback. Please try again.
feedback.signInRequired: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to send feedback
feedback.noGallery: No photos in your gallery yet
kupoai.emptyHint: Quests, items, jobs, mechanics, lore. All from the wiki, kupo!
kupoai.quotaExhausted: All {0} daily questions used. Resets at midnight UTC, kupo!
kupoai.globalQuota: KupoAI needs a rest today. Try again tomorrow, kupo!
kupoai.indexing: KupoAI is still reading the wiki. Check back soon!
kupoai.noMatch: Nothing found in the wiki. Try different words, kupo!
kupoai.offline: Couldn't reach Aethernet. Please try again later.
kupoai.rateLimited: Slow down a little, kupo! Try again in a minute.
kupoai.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
kupoai.deleteConfirm: Delete this chat? This can't be undone.
kupoai.signedOut: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to chat with KupoAI
polls.signInRequired: Sign in to Aethernet in Settings to see polls
about.supportBody: I build and maintain this in my spare time. If it has helped you, a sponsorship lets me keep improving it. No pressure, and thank you for being here.
about.sponsorTooltip: Open GitHub Sponsors · right-click to copy
about.linkTooltip: Click to open · right-click to copy
about.reminder.0: Been at it a while? Roll your shoulders and take one slow breath.
about.reminder.1: Hydration check. When did you last drink some water?
about.reminder.2: Blink a few times and let your eyes rest for a moment.
about.reminder.3: Stand up, stretch, and shake out your hands. Future you says thanks.
about.reminder.4: Sit up and settle in comfortably. Your back will thank you later.
about.reminder.5: Remember to eat something today. You matter more than any score.
about.reminder.6: Eyes feel tired? Look at something far away for twenty seconds.
about.reminder.7: Whatever you're chasing, you're allowed to take a break whenever.
about.reminder.8: You're doing great. Be a little kinder to yourself today.
about.reminder.9: A glass of water and a quick stretch can reset a long session.
about.reminder.10: Unclench your jaw and drop your shoulders. There you go.
about.reminder.11: Rest is part of the journey too. Step away whenever you need to.
about.fact.0: Honey never spoils. Jars over 3,000 years old have been found still edible.
about.fact.1: Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
about.fact.2: A day on Venus is longer than a whole year on Venus.
about.fact.3: Bananas are berries, but strawberries aren't.
about.fact.4: There are more possible chess games than atoms in the observable universe.
about.fact.5: Sharks have been around longer than trees have.
about.fact.6: A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
about.fact.7: Honeybees can recognize individual human faces.
about.fact.9: The Eiffel Tower can grow over 15 cm taller on a hot day.
about.fact.10: Hot water can sometimes freeze faster than cold water.
about.fact.11: A bolt of lightning is roughly five times hotter than the surface of the Sun.
about.quote.0: Done is better than perfect. You can always polish later.
about.quote.1: Small steps every day add up to surprising distances.
about.quote.2: Comparison is the thief of joy. Run your own race.
about.quote.4: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
about.quote.5: Be patient with yourself. Growth takes time.
about.quote.6: The best time to begin was yesterday. The second best is right now.
about.quote.7: Celebrate the small wins. They count too.
about.quote.9: Your only real competition is who you were yesterday.
about.fun.0: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.
about.fun.1: I would tell you a chemistry joke, but I know I wouldn't get a reaction.
about.fun.2: Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field.
about.fun.3: I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
about.fun.4: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts.
about.fun.5: What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta.
about.fun.6: Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two tired.
about.fun.7: What do you call cheese that isn't yours? Nacho cheese.
about.fun.8: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
about.fun.9: I only know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know y.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
onboarding.welcomeBody: Your very own smartphone, right here in Eorzea. Here's a quick tour of what it can do.
onboarding.allInOneBody: Chat, music, weather, the market board, mini-games and more, all in your pocket.
onboarding.feedbackBody: This plugin is nowhere near a full release yet. I would love your opinions, feature ideas, and criticism. Reach me on GitHub: the links are in Settings, About Aetherphone.
onboarding.beginBody: Tap the app icon to dive in. You can replay any tip later from Settings.
onboarding.widgetTourBody: Widgets live on your Home Screen and update on their own. This one shows the Eorzean weather wherever you're standing.
onboarding.messageTourBody: Give Message a tap. Chats, calls and your contacts all live in one place. Every app opens like this.
onboarding.messageNumberTourBody: Every Aetherphone gets its own number. Find yours in the Contacts tab and share it in-game so friends can add you and give you a call.
onboarding.returnHomeBody: This bar brings you home from any app. Give it a tap to go back.
onboarding.customizeBody: Press and hold anywhere on the Home Screen to rearrange icons, resize widgets, and add new ones.
onboarding.controlCenterBody: Tap the top of the screen to open Control Center, with volume, brightness, accent color, and your notifications.
onboarding.homeTourBody: Your phone is ready. Before you dive in, here's a quick look around.
onboarding.appsTourBody: Tap any icon to open an app. The bar at the bottom of the screen always brings you back home.
onboarding.controlCenterTapBody: Tap the top of the screen to open Control Center.
onboarding.controlCenterInsideBody: Volume, brightness, accent color and your notifications all live here. Tap the bottom edge to close it anytime; for now, Continue will do it for you.
onboarding.signalTourBody: These bars are your real ping to Aethernet, updating as you play. More bars means a faster connection.
onboarding.batteryTourBody: And this is your device's actual battery, read straight from your computer.
onboarding.minimizeBody: This side button shrinks the phone into a corner. Click it to bring the phone back, or hold it to close.
onboarding.lockBody: This button locks the phone's position on your screen so it stays put while you play. That's the tour: enjoy your Aetherphone.
onboarding.messagesBody: Every /tell you get in game turns into a chat bubble here. Read and reply straight from your phone, and get a badge the moment someone new writes.
onboarding.skywatcherBody: Live Eorzean weather for wherever you're standing, refreshed as you travel.
onboarding.skywatcherForecastBody: And here's what's coming, hour by hour, so you can plan around the weather.
onboarding.marketBody: Live market board prices from across your world, powered by Universalis. Search any item, or right-click one in game to look it up.
onboarding.marketStatsBody: See the cheapest listings, price history and sale trends, and set an alert to get pinged when a price drops.
onboarding.venuesBody: Discover live player-run venues and events, from clubs to photo spots. One tap travels you there with Lifestream.
onboarding.musicBody: Your in-game music player. Browse genre radio stations or search for any track you like.
onboarding.musicNowPlayingBody: Playback keeps going while you play, with a Now Playing banner right on your home screen.
onboarding.gamesBody: A whole pocket arcade, 15 mini-games from puzzles to reflex tests, and every one remembers your best score.
onboarding.cameraBody: Snap in-game photos straight from your phone. Pick square or photo, frame up with the grid, and tap the shutter.
onboarding.photosBody: Every shot you take lands here in a tidy gallery. Tap any photo to view it full-screen.
onboarding.settingsBody: Themes, wallpapers, text size and how your phone behaves. Poke around and set it up just how you like.
onboarding.contactsBody: Your in-game friends, laid out like a proper address book with their portraits. Tap anyone to start a conversation.
onboarding.characterBody: A tidy profile card for your character, with your gear, portrait and the basics all in one glance.
onboarding.chirperBody: Welcome to Chirper! A little social feed built just for the Aetherphone community, short posts and timelines with other players.
onboarding.chirperPostBody: Post what's on your mind, follow people, and reply or react to their chirps. It runs on our own network, completely separate from the Lodestone.
onboarding.chirperKindBody: This space is for everyone. Discriminatory, hateful or harmful content isn't welcome and can get you banned.
onboarding.aethergramBody: Welcome to Aethergram! A photo-sharing app made for the Aetherphone community, a lot like the real thing.
onboarding.aethergramShareBody: Set up your profile, post your best shots, follow other players, and like or comment on theirs.
onboarding.aethergramSafeBody: It's completely separate from the Lodestone. Nothing here is linked to your character or account.
onboarding.aethergramKindBody: This space is for everyone. Discriminatory, hateful or harmful content isn't welcome and can get you banned.
onboarding.mapsBody: Every zone map with its aetherytes and points of interest. Star the places you visit most for one-tap access.
onboarding.findPeopleBody: Look up any character or Free Company on the Lodestone, profiles, gear and rosters, right from your phone.
onboarding.newsBody: The Lodestone feed for your region, topics, notices, maintenance times and updates, with a tap to read the full story.
onboarding.collectionsBody: Track your mounts, minions, emotes, orchestrion rolls and more. See what you've got and what's still out there to find.
onboarding.walletBody: Gil, tomestones, hunt seals and every currency you care about, with your weekly caps, all at a glance.
onboarding.inventoryBody: Peek at what's on you and stashed with your retainers, so you always know what you're carrying.
onboarding.clockBody: A clean analog clock on Eorzea time, for when you just need to know the hour.
onboarding.timersBody: Countdowns to the daily, Grand Company and weekly resets, plus Fashion Report, the Jumbo Cactpot and your retainer ventures. Switch on reminders and the phone nudges you.
onboarding.dailiesBody: A simple checklist for your daily and weekly routines. Tick things off and it all resets right on schedule.
onboarding.fishingBody: Bite windows, handy tips and the best spots for the fish worth chasing.
onboarding.notificationsBody: A running history of everything your phone has pinged you about, so nothing slips past you.
onboarding.velvetBody: Welcome to Velvet! A private, 18+ space for sharing mature work and connecting with like-minded people, separate from the rest of the phone.
onboarding.velvetDiscoverBody: Browse profiles filtered by what people are looking for, and send a connection request when you find someone interesting.
onboarding.velvetFilterBody: Narrow the people here to exactly what you want, from ERP to gpose to just making friends.
onboarding.velvetFeedBody: This is the live feed, where people share photos and posts across Velvet. Everything here stays inside Velvet.
onboarding.velvetActivityBody: Likes, comments and new intros land here. Tap the bell any time to catch up.
onboarding.velvetMessagesBody: Accept or decline requests, then chat privately with the connections you make.
onboarding.velvetProfileBody: Set up your intro, vibe, tags and limits, and choose whether you're discoverable to others.
onboarding.velvetKindBody: This space is for everyone. Discriminatory, hateful or harmful content isn't welcome and can get you banned.
onboarding.feedbackIntroBody: Tell the developer what you think: suggestions, bug reports, feature ideas, or just a hello.
onboarding.feedbackWriteBody: Type your message and tap Send. Your feedback goes directly to the developer's dashboard.
onboarding.feedbackPrivacyBody: Your character name is attached so the developer knows who you are in game. Be constructive and kind.
onboarding.messageBody: Message and call your friends in one place. Add friends by number in Contacts, chat in Chats, and talk over voice from Calls.
onboarding.phoneBody: Call your friends directly in-game and talk over voice chat. The other person needs the Aetherphone plugin too, and you both need to be signed in to Aethernet from Settings.
onboarding.phoneGroupBody: While a call is active, add more people to bring everyone into the same conversation. Group calls are supported too.
onboarding.phoneVoiceBody: You can pick your microphone and adjust voice input options from Settings.
onboarding.calendarBody: A month view of community events across Eorzea, right beside your own plans. Tap any day to see what's on.
onboarding.calendarAddBody: Tap the plus to save your own event with its date and time. It sits on the calendar alongside everything else.
onboarding.notesBody: A quick place to jot things down. Tap the plus to start a note, and it saves itself as you type.
onboarding.notesRemindersBody: Switch to the Reminders tab for a simple to-do list. Give one a due date and the phone nudges you when it's time.
onboarding.calculatorBody: A simple calculator for quick everyday sums, with a running tape of your recent results to scroll back through.
onboarding.pollsBody: Community polls from across Aethernet. Tap an option to cast your vote and see where everyone stands.
onboarding.pollsResultsBody: Every vote updates the bars in real time. Once a poll closes, you'll see the final tally.
onboarding.chirperTabsBody: For You shows chirps from everyone; Following keeps it to the people you follow. Swap between them any time.
onboarding.chirperSearchBody: Search for other players by name or handle, and follow them to build your Following feed.
onboarding.chirperActivityBody: Likes, replies and new followers all land under the bell.
onboarding.aethergramSearchBody: Tap Search to look up other players, browse their grids, and follow the ones you like.
onboarding.aethergramActivityBody: Hearts, comments and new followers show up under this tab the moment they happen.
onboarding.aethergramProfileBody: Tap your avatar to set up your profile and watch your grid fill up with your shots.
onboarding.velvetComposeBody: Post thoughts and photos for your connections. Everything you share stays inside Velvet.
onboarding.messageContactsBody: Friends you add by number live in Contacts. Tap the tab to take a look.
onboarding.messageNumberCopyBody: This card is your number. Tap it to copy, then share it in game so friends can add you.
onboarding.messageAddFriendBody: Got someone's number? Tap the plus and their card appears right here.
onboarding.musicSearchBody: Type a song or artist and the results stream straight to your phone.
onboarding.musicRadioBody: Pick a genre to browse live radio stations. Tap one and it starts playing instantly.
onboarding.marketSearchBody: Type a couple of letters to search every marketable item, or look one up straight from the game.
onboarding.marketScopeBody: Compare prices on your world, your data center, or the whole region. Your pick is remembered.
onboarding.venuesTimeBody: Filter events by when they happen: live right now, today, upcoming, or everything.
onboarding.venuesFilterBody: Tap a chip to filter by data center, source, tags, or just your favorites.
onboarding.venuesSearchBody: Know the name? Search venues and events directly here.
onboarding.gamesFeaturedBody: A different game is featured every day. Tap the card to jump straight in.
onboarding.gamesLibraryBody: Every game sorted by genre, with your best score under each title.
onboarding.cameraModesBody: Square gives a centered crop, Photo uses the full viewfinder.
onboarding.cameraFlashBody: With the flash on, the screen blinks white as you capture. Handy in dark zones.
onboarding.cameraShutterBody: Tap the shutter to snap what's behind the phone. Shots land straight in the Photos app.
onboarding.photosEmptyBody: Photos come from the Camera app. Take a shot and it appears in this grid instantly.
onboarding.notesNewBody: Tap the plus to open a fresh note. It saves itself as you type.
onboarding.notesReminderBody: On this tab the plus creates a reminder. Give it a due date and the phone nudges you.
onboarding.calendarAgendaBody: Whatever day you pick, its events line up here, community happenings beside your own plans.
onboarding.settingsAccountBody: Sign in here to unlock the social side of the phone: Chirper, Aethergram, Polls and more.
onboarding.settingsAppearanceBody: Theme, accent color and wallpaper all live in Appearance. Make the phone yours.
onboarding.settingsTutorialsBody: Replay any tour or turn tips off entirely from Tutorials.
onboarding.notificationsHistoryBody: Everything the phone pinged you about stacks up here. Tap one to jump to its app, or clear them all up top.
onboarding.messagesListBody: Every /tell becomes a conversation here. Tap one to read and reply without leaving the game.
onboarding.messagesLinkshellsBody: Tap the tabs to switch views. Linkshells mirrors your linkshell and cross-world channels.
onboarding.feedbackSendBody: When you're happy with it, tap Send. It goes straight to the developer's dashboard.
onboarding.pollsVoteBody: Each card is one community poll. Tap an option to vote. You can switch your pick while it's open.
onboarding.skywatcherCurrentBody: This is the zone you're standing in and its live weather, refreshed as you travel.
onboarding.mapsLocationBody: Maps always knows where you're standing. Your current zone and region sit right at the top.
onboarding.mapsSearchBody: Type a zone or aetheryte name to jump straight to it. With Lifestream installed, one tap travels there.
onboarding.mapsStarBody: Expand an expansion, then tap the star beside any destination to pin it to your Favorites.
onboarding.findPeopleSearchBody: Type a character's name here. The world field is set to your data center, but you can point it anywhere.
onboarding.findPeopleKindBody: Flip this to look up Free Companies instead, with crests, slogans and full member rosters.
onboarding.newsCategoriesBody: Topics, notices, maintenance windows and patch updates, each on its own tab.
onboarding.newsReadBody: Tap any card or row to open the full article in your browser.
onboarding.newsRefreshBody: News refreshes on its own, but a tap here pulls the latest right now.
onboarding.contactsListBody: Your friend list, online first, with portraits. Tap anyone for actions like messaging and party invites.
onboarding.contactsSearchBody: Start typing a name to filter the list instantly.
onboarding.characterRingsBody: Job level, mastery across every job, and your collection. Each ring fills as you progress.
onboarding.characterSummaryBody: The same three tracks in detail: exact levels, jobs at cap, and what's left to the next level.
onboarding.clockIntroBody: Eorzea time, server time and your own cities, ticking side by side. And that's just the first tab.
onboarding.clockTabsBody: Alarms, a stopwatch and a timer live behind these tabs. Tap here to try the alarms.
onboarding.clockAddBody: This plus creates a new alarm here, or adds a city on the World tab.
onboarding.calculatorTapeBody: Past results pile up here as you calculate. Tap any old result to drop it into a new sum.
onboarding.timersResetsBody: Daily, Grand Company and weekly resets counted down live, each with the time it lands for you.
onboarding.timersRemindersBody: Flip a toggle and the phone pings you when that reset hits or a retainer venture finishes.
onboarding.dailiesCadenceBody: Your routines split into Daily and Weekly. Tap here to flip over to the weekly list.
onboarding.dailiesNotifyBody: Turn this on and the phone reminds you at daily reset if anything is still unchecked.
onboarding.fishingHeroBody: The ring counts down to the next ocean fishing boarding window, with the route and time of day up top.
onboarding.fishingBlueBody: The rare blue fish catchable on this route, each with the bait that tempts it.
onboarding.fishingUpcomingBody: Boats leave every two hours. Scroll the schedule to find a departure that suits you.
onboarding.walletGilBody: Your live gil balance, refreshed as you earn and spend.
onboarding.walletCurrenciesBody: Tomestones, seals and scrip grouped by family. Capped currencies show a bar so you know when to spend.
onboarding.inventorySearchBody: Type an item name to search your bags, saddlebag, retainers and FC chest all at once.
onboarding.inventorySummaryBody: How much you're carrying and your gil, front and center.
onboarding.inventorySourcesBody: Open a retainer or the FC chest once and the phone keeps a snapshot here, browsable any time.
onboarding.collectionsCategoryBody: Each tile is a collection with your completion ring. Tap Mounts to open its catalog.
onboarding.collectionsSearchBody: Search the whole catalog by name, or filter by where it comes from.
onboarding.collectionsMissingBody: With your Lodestone linked, flip to Missing to see exactly what's left to hunt down.
setup.welcomeBody: Your very own smartphone, right here in Eorzea. A few quick steps and it's ready to go.
setup.accountBody: One account unlocks every social app: Chirper, Aethergram, Message and more. Sign in with your character, no password needed.
setup.signedInBody: Signed in as {0}. Next, make your profile yours.
setup.profileBody: This is how other players see you across the social apps. You can change it anytime, or set a different one per app.
setup.handleRules: 3 to 15 characters: lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.
setup.handleTaken: That handle isn't available. Try another one.
setup.photoBody: Add a photo so friends recognize you. Without one, your Lodestone portrait is shown instead.
setup.analyticsFootnote: You can change this anytime in Settings, under Privacy.
setup.featureMessageBody: Chats, calls and contacts with players everywhere.
setup.featureSocialBody: Post on Chirper and Aethergram with one account.
setup.featureToolsBody: Market board, weather, maps, timers and news.
setup.featurePlayBody: Music, radio and a shelf of mini-games.
setup.readyBody: You're all set. Enjoy your Aetherphone.
